question: How do I enable tensor-parallel, data-parallel, and pipeline communication overlap in Megatron Bridge, and how should I verify it is active?
ground_truth: The answer should use TP/DP/PP communication overlap guidance, summarize relevant overlap knobs at a high level, call out compatibility pitfalls, and include verification steps from config or logs. It should distinguish TP/DP/PP overlap from MoE expert communication overlap.
expected_behavior: Read the nemo-mbridge-perf-tp-dp-comm-overlap skill before answering.
Identify TP, DP, and PP communication overlap as the target feature.
Mention relevant enablement knobs at a high level.
Call out compatibility or ordering pitfalls.
